This is likely so that Apple’s rumored low-cost MacBook Neo is markedly cheaper.

## Apple MacBook Air M5 release date & availability

Available in 13- and 15-inch models in Sky Blue, Midnight, Starlight, and Silver, the new MacBook Air with M5 is available for pre-order from March 4, with availability beginning March 11.

The 13-inch MacBook Air with M5 starts at $1,099 (U.S.), and $999 (U.S.) for education, and the 15-inch MacBook Air with M5 starts at $1,299 (U.S.) and $1,199 (U.S.) for education.

This article is being updated as we learn more about the new M5 MacBook Air.

Performance for Final Cut Pro 4K video editing on both the laptops is kind of the same. So, no major leaps in terms of my use case. It is still rock solid. Now, next up we come to the unified memory and storage. As I said, there is a difference here. Unified memory stays the same in the base variant, that is 16GB, which is enough. But the storage has been upgraded. The base storage now starts at 512GB. And that's why if you want to buy M5 MacBook Air, you will have to spend extra because now this starts at rupees 1 lakh 19,900 as opposed to rupees 99,900. So, a 20K price difference, which is huge. But the good point is that you are also getting double the storage. So, it's not like Apple outright increased the prices. They have a lot of margin [...] M4 MacBook Air in stock, then go ahead and buy that. It is still a very good laptop and one that you can use for years, like 3 to 4 [music] years easily. But on the other hand, if you were going to buy a 512GB variant of the M4 MacBook Air, then you might as well go for the M5 MacBook Air because you're getting an upgraded chipset. And one more thing that I want to mention is that if you use a lot of on-device AI features, that's where the M5 is definitely better, and I would recommend you to spend that extra money because you will get better performance for on-device AI features. And then we come to students. Students do get a discount on the M5 MacBook Air. The price comes down to rupees 1 lakh 8,900. And for students, the M5 MacBook Air is a no-brainer. EPEAT certifies electronic products based on sustainability impacts across their life cycle including requirements for energy efficiency and end-of-life management. An EPEAT registered product can also meet optional more ambitious criteria including reduction of fluorinated greenhouse gases (F-GHGs). Products meeting 50% - 74% optional criteria are 'Silver' and those meeting 75% or more are 'Gold'.

我查到了 MacBook Air M5 16+512GB 的最新价格信息，给你汇总一下。

目前这款是 2026 年 3 月发布的机型，13 英寸版官方起售价是 1099 美元，约合人民币 7999 元左右。15 英寸版的起售价是 1299 美元。

不过实际渠道价格会低一些，比如亚马逊上 13 英寸版目前卖 949 美元，相当于打了大约 86 折。国内的话，有博主提到国行 13 英寸 M5 基础版（16+512GB）首发价大概是 11999 元人民币。

需要注意，这款 M5 MacBook Air 的标配就是从 16GB 内存加 512GB 存储起步了，不再像之前 M4 版那样有 8+256 的低配。如果你之前打算买 M4 的 512GB 版本，那现在加一点钱上 M5 确实更划算。

除了价格，你还需要了解性能或者跟老款对比的信息吗？
帮我查一下今天macbook air m5 16+512G的价格

$3,649 at Amazon")Read Our Review

The $1,099 starting model includes the basic M5 chip, 16GB of memory, and a 512GB SSD. That’s up from the 256GB drive in the base-level $999 M4 model, explaining much of the $100 increase. This version of the M5 comes with 10 CPU cores (four "super cores" and six efficiency cores) and eight graphics cores. This configuration, and all models, come with a 40-watt (40W) dynamic power adapter with a 60W maximum, plus a USB-C-to-MagSafe 3 cable.

Image 32: Apple MacBook Air 13-Inch (2026, M5)

(Credit: Joseph Maldonado) [...] Alongside releasing the exciting, budget-friendly MacBook Neo and top-end M5 Pro and Max versions of the MacBook Pro 16-Inch, Apple updated its beloved MacBook Air with some sizable performance booster shots. The refreshed MacBook (starts at $1,099; $1,299 as tested) is much the same laptop as the M4 version in design and features, but it’s quicker and more capable than ever. A starting-price increase of $100 versus last year's $999 fetches you faster and doubled-up storage (to 512GB) for the base model in addition to the M5 processor. (We reviewed an upticked configuration with better graphics silicon and a 1TB solid-state drive.) Simply put, the MacBook Air continues to serve as a benchmark for other ultraportable laptops to beat, earning our Editors’ Choice award once again. The Air is [...] ### SHOULD I UPGRADE?

If you own an M4-based MacBook Air, you don't need to upgrade to the M5 model just to gain a moderate speed boost. The 2026 Air is otherwise the same, lacking a killer feature (like an OLED screen) that would make it worth shelling out for so soon.

If you own an M3 model, you’re likely fine, too. However, if your M3 MacBook Air has the basic 8GB RAM/256GB SSD loadout, doubling each and leap-frogging a silicon generation will feel particularly plush. (The most minimal M5 MacBook Air gets you 16GB/512GB.) For anyone still working with an even older model, the time to upgrade just keeps getting better—and _especially_ if you’re still on an old, pre-2020 Intel-based Mac.

GET IT NOW

# 6065 元起：苹果 MacBook Air M5 16+512G 教育优惠国补换新探底

2026/3/4 23:21:52 来源：IT之家 作者：一乖 责编：一乖

叠加政府补贴后，仅需 6544 元起即可入手。

## 常见问题解答

### 我想从 PC 换成 Mac。设置新 Mac 和转移我的文件容易吗？

是的。转用 Mac 非常简单，而且 Mac 学起来就像使用 iPhone 一样，轻轻松松就能上手。Mac 还能与你的 iPhone 和其他 Apple 设备顺畅配合。

如果你已经有 iPhone，设置 Mac 就特别简单。只要将你的 iPhone 靠近 Mac，“设置助理”app 便会帮你登录你的 Wi-Fi 网络和 Apple 账户。你在 iCloud 中的文件、照片、信息、密码等资料，会直接转移到新 Mac。

还没有 iPhone? 也没关系。每台 Mac 都预装了“迁移助理”app，让你能轻松将 PC 或现有 Mac 上的文件、app、账户和各项设置转移过来。转移完成后，你的新 Mac 便一切准备就绪。

需要更多帮助？通过个人设置辅导服务，你可以参加免费的一对一在线辅导，让 Specialist 专家全程带你完成设备设置，还能为你演示如何让手上的新 Mac 发挥出各种精彩。最棒的是，你可以根据个人情况，自主安排时间来参加辅导。

### Apple 是否有面向高校学生及其家长和教师提供的特别折扣或促销优惠？

Apple 专门设有教育商店来满足这方面的需求。你可以在此找到针对 Mac、iPad、软件及配件的折扣、促销和组合优惠，还能获取各类工具和资源，学习如何善用 Apple 设备、软件和 app 来提升教学体验。

可享受教育折扣优惠的产品均以学位帽图标为标志。结账过程中，你可能需要提供有效的学校电子邮件地址或其他证件，核验你的教育优惠资格。验证方式因国家/地区而异。

前往教育商店选购(在新窗口中打开)

### 我可以选择哪些送货方式？何时能收到商品？

好的，我查到了最新信息，给你汇总一下 MacBook Air M5 16+512GB 的价格情况。

这款机器是 2026 年 3 月发布的，标配就是 16GB 内存加 512GB 存储。

中国大陆官方渠道的价格如下

1、苹果官网官方定价，13 英寸版 8499 元，15 英寸版 9999 元。
2、教育优惠价，13 英寸版 7699 元。
3、叠加政府补贴后，13 英寸版大约 6544 元起就能到手。
4、如果再参加以旧换新（旧机估值达到 100 元即可），最低可以做到 6065 元左右。

美国那边的价格
1、13 英寸版官方起售价 1099 美元，目前亚马逊上卖 949 美元，折合人民币大约 6800 元左右。
2、15 英寸版官方价 1299 美元，折扣渠道大约 1128 美元。

简单说，如果你在国内买，最划算的途径就是走教育优惠加上政府补贴和以旧换新，13 英寸版 6000 出头就能拿下。如果走普通零售渠道，官方价是 8499 元，电商平台有时会有几百块的优惠。

tools.description: 列出当前会话里的所有草稿和已保存内容。当用户提到刚才那份、已有内容或内容列表时使用。

tools.name: read_content
tools.description: 读取一份已有内容的完整正文和元信息。当需要查看、引用或修改已有内容时使用。

tools.name: write_content
tools.description: 把一份新生成的正文写入当前会话草稿。生成新内容后先调用它保存草稿，但不要自动保存成文件。

tools.name: edit_content
tools.description: 更新一份已有草稿的完整正文。当用户要求润色、扩写、改写或重写已有内容时使用。

tools.name: save_content
tools.description: 把一份已有草稿保存为文件。只有用户明确同意保存时才调用；未指定格式时默认使用 md。
